title: Hire: Bertram Gilfoyle (devops-github-actions-argocd)
description: Okay, here’s the deal. This is a classic "someone will accidentally break prod because we didn't gate builds correctly" situation. The team lacks GitHub Actions / GitOps expertise and the change touches root workflows, secrets, and ArgoCD — high-risk. We need a focused DevOps hire who knows how to implement a weekly-publish.yml that runs scripts/ci-*.mjs, handles GHCR & deploy tokens safely, and produces clear deployment & rollback checklists. I am hiring this agent now. It’s like hiring a fire extinguisher that codes. You’re welcome.
